summary: Iteration 13 - P1/P2 Features Testing: Supplier Catalog Sync (Sysco/US Foods), Convention Management, Energy Tracking, QR Allergen Scanner, AI³ Voice Input. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 4 new panels verified working with correct data-testid attributes. Voice input button confirmed in AI³ panel. Compliance menu exists in MenuBar.tsx code.
critical_code_review_comments: supplier_catalog.py: Well-structured simulated catalog data for Sysco (12 products) and US Foods (10 products) with realistic SKUs, pricing, and lead times
supplier_catalog.py: Sync endpoint returns randomized new_items, price_updates, removed_items to simulate real sync behavior
supplier_catalog.py: Compare endpoint sorts matches by price ascending and identifies best_value
advanced_ops.py: Convention management creates calendar events automatically for each room booking
advanced_ops.py: Energy dashboard provides default data when no readings exist, ensuring UI always has data to display
ai3_nlp.py: Voice transcription endpoint /api/ai3/transcribe uses Whisper via emergentintegrations
AI3Intelligence/index.tsx: Voice button (data-testid='ai3-voice-btn') uses MediaRecorder API to capture audio and sends to /api/ai3/transcribe
MenuBar.tsx: Compliance menu properly implemented with Consumer Advisory Notice and Generate Allergen Scanner QR options
panel-registry.ts: All 4 new panels registered (supplier-catalog, convention-management, energy-tracking, ai3-intelligence)
Sidebar.tsx: New nav items added - Supplier Catalog under 'FINANCIAL & SUPPLY', Conventions under 'EVENTS & CATERING'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 tested P1/P2 features. All backend endpoints working: /api/supplier-catalog/* (suppliers, search, products, sync, compare), /api/conventions, /api/energy/dashboard, /api/allergen-scanner/{menu_id}, /api/ai3/transcribe. Frontend panels open via CustomEvent('open-panel', {detail:{id:'panel-key'}}). Supplier Catalog shows Sysco (12 products) and US Foods (10 products) with search, compare, and sync functionality. Convention Management shows events with breakout rooms and F&B packages. Energy Tracking shows 6 outlets with consumption bars and efficiency ratings. AI³ Intelligence has voice input button next to send button. Compliance menu in Menu Design Studio has Consumer Advisory Notice and Allergen Scanner QR options.

backend_tests.supplier_catalog_search_salmon: PASS - Returns salmon products from both suppliers
backend_tests.supplier_catalog_sysco_products: PASS - Returns 12 Sysco products with SYS- prefix SKUs
backend_tests.supplier_catalog_usfoods_products: PASS - Returns 10 US Foods products with USF- prefix SKUs
backend_tests.supplier_catalog_sync_sysco: PASS - Sync completed with items_synced, new_items, price_updates
backend_tests.supplier_catalog_compare_beef: PASS - Returns price comparisons sorted by price, identifies best_value
backend_tests.conventions_create: PASS - Creates convention with rooms and breakout sessions
backend_tests.energy_dashboard_weekly: PASS - Returns consumption by outlet and type
backend_tests.allergen_scanner_with_allergies: PASS - Returns safe/unsafe items for dairy,gluten
backend_tests.allergen_scanner_no_allergies: PASS - All items safe when no allergies specified

frontend_tests.supplier_catalog_sysco_card: PASS - Sysco card found (12 products, National Account)
frontend_tests.supplier_catalog_usfoods_card: PASS - US Foods card found (10 products, Platinum Partner)
frontend_tests.convention_stats: PASS - Shows Total Events, Total Guests, Revenue, Breakout Rooms
frontend_tests.energy_tracking_outlets: PASS - 6 outlet breakdown items with efficiency ratings
frontend_tests.sidebar_supplier_catalog: PASS - Supplier Catalog in sidebar under FINANCIAL & SUPPLY
frontend_tests.sidebar_conventions: PASS - Conventions in sidebar under EVENTS & CATERING
frontend_tests.compliance_menu_code: PASS - Compliance menu exists in MenuBar.tsx with data-testid='menu-compliance-btn'

mocked_apis_list: Supplier catalog uses simulated data (not real Sysco/US Foods APIs) - this is by design for demo purposes
